serviceIntervals.task: Rear brake pads and discs - park brake drums / shoes

serviceNotes.Engine oil & filter: EU: Toyota GR86 sold in Europe follows the same 15,000 km / 12 month (or 10,000 mi / 12 month UK) service rhythm as documented for the ZN8 platform; oil & filter at each ‘A’ interval matches Toyota NZ GR schedule and Subaru EU 15,000 km policy for the ZD8 twin.
serviceNotes.Cabin air filter: Toyota NZ GR86 ‘A’ service: cabin air filter inspect (¤); 30,000 km / 24 months used as normal replacement cadence when no fixed replace km is listed for GR86 in regional booklets.
serviceNotes.Air filter element: Aligned to Subaru ZD8 BRZ MY22+ first air-cleaner replace at 45,000 km / 36 months (same FA24 D-4S powertrain); Toyota NZ lists air filter R at ‘C’ (45,000 km) — values match.
serviceNotes.Spark plugs (Iridium type): Changed from 90,000 km / 72 months (Toyota NZ ‘D’ package) to 120,000 km / 120 months per Subaru MY22+ BRZ/WRX handbook spark row for the shared FA24 engine (EU priority: single OEM schedule for the twin).
serviceNotes.Brake and clutch fluid (DOT4): 24-month DOT4 replacement; NZ ‘B’ service at 30,000 km includes brake fluid R on the published km plan — time basis retained as 24 months.
serviceNotes.Front brake pads and discs: Inspect each 15,000 km / 12 month ‘A’ service (EU rhythm; Toyota NZ checklist).
serviceNotes.Rear brake pads and discs - park brake d: Inspect each ‘A’ service on the same checklist as the front axle.
serviceNotes.Rear diff oil: Toyota NZ: rear diff oil R at ‘B’ (30,000 km / 24 months); matches Subaru BRZ ZD8 handbook I R pattern.
serviceNotes.Auto transmission fluid: Changed from 90,000 km / 72 months (Toyota NZ ‘D’) to 75,000 km / 60 months per Subaru MY22+ BRZ automatic transmission fluid replace at E service (same gearbox application).
serviceNotes.Engine / Heater Coolant: Changed from 150,000 km / 120 months (Toyota NZ ‘E’) to 120,000 km / 96 months per Subaru MY22+ BRZ coolant R at H service (shared FA24 cooling system specification).
serviceNotes.Manual transmission oil: Toyota NZ: manual transmission oil I on ‘A’ services; preventive exchange 120,000 km / 120 months when fluid darkens or after track use (same specialist interval as Subaru-BRZ-FA24 REC).

serviceSources.Engine oil & filter: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU 15,000 km / 12 month service baseline (ZD8/ZN8 twin). https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — GR86 ZN8: 15,000 km ‘A’ service includes engine oil & filter R.
serviceSources.Cabin air filter: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU cabin filter per manual. https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘A’ service cabin air filter inspect (¤); 30,000 km / 24 months replacement cadence.
serviceSources.Air filter element: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU air filter per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — air cleaner I I R at 45,000 km / 36 months. https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘C’ service air filter element R at 45,000 km.
serviceSources.Spark plugs (Iridium type): https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU spark interval per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — MY22+ BRZ spark plugs R at 120,000 km / 120 months (FA24 twin; supersedes Toyota NZ 90,000 km ‘D’ row for EU-aligned single schedule).
serviceSources.Brake and clutch fluid (DOT4): https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU brake fluid per authorised repairer. https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘B’ service: brake and clutch fluid (DOT4) R; 24-month time basis.
serviceSources.Front brake pads and discs: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU brake inspection each service. https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘A’ checklist: front brake pads and discs I.
serviceSources.Rear brake pads and discs - park brake d: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU brake inspection each service. https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘A’ checklist: rear brake pads and discs I.
serviceSources.Rear diff oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU differential per manual. https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘B’ service: rear diff oil R at 30,000 km / 24 months.
serviceSources.Auto transmission fluid: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU ATF per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — BRZ ATF R at E service 75,000 km / 60 months (ZN8 automatic twin; supersedes Toyota NZ 90,000 km ‘D’ row).
serviceSources.Engine / Heater Coolant: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU coolant per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — coolant R at H 120,000 km / 96 months (FA24 twin; supersedes Toyota NZ 150,000 km ‘E’ first replace).
serviceSources.Manual transmission oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU gearbox oil per manual. https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — manual transmission oil I on ‘A’ services. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — preventive 120,000 km / 120 months when fluid condition warrants.
